name: Powerline Nord
description: Two-line statusline with Nord arctic color palette and angled powerline segments. Top line shows model/context/cost; bottom shows git/duration/lines. Cold, clean, professional.
features: Two-line layout: top for model/context/cost, bottom for git/duration/lines
Nord palette: frost blue, polar night charcoal, aurora semantic colors
Angled powerline arrow transitions between segments
Context bar shifts through aurora green/orange/red by load
Git branch with staged/modified file counts (bottom line)
Lines added/removed with aurora green and red coloring
